speaker: Piero Cipollone
tone_summary: Cipollone's entire recent speech record is dominated by the digital euro agenda — payments sovereignty, tokenisation, DLT infrastructure. None of his speeches in the 8-week window contain substantive monetary policy rate guidance or hawkish signals. His framing is consistently pro-European integration and focused on financial infrastructure resilience. Two of his five speeches were only available as PDFs. His low hawkishness score reflects the near-total absence of rate or inflation commentary; he is effectively off-mandate from a hawkishness-scoring perspective in this period.
representative_quote: Sovereignty is only as strong as the infrastructure it rests on. And that infrastructure must be resilient.
